source_name: ABS Consumer Price Index - all groups annual change, monthly
notes: Fetched from ABS Data API dataflow CPI, key 3.10001.10.50.M. Values are sorted by TIME_PERIOD and trimmed to the last 60 monthly observations. ABS CPI dataflow MEASURE 3 (Percentage change from previous year), INDEX 10001 (All groups CPI), TSEST 10 (Original), REGION 50 (Australia weighted average of eight capital cities), FREQ M. Returns the headline all-groups annual percentage change, monthly.
source_rights: CC BY 4.0 where stated by publisher
citation: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Consumer Price Index Australia (Cat. 6401.0), all-groups annual percentage change.
